strangler_constraints: src/engine + committed motorlar (src/backtest, src/screening, lab, clib) DOKUNULMAZ; sadece examples/ + docs/ altinda YENI dosya.
construction_window_ic_horizon_coupling_: construction_window=21 plays a DUAL role (moda.py:427): it is BOTH the signal's engine-facing construction_window AND the Mod-A IC forward-return HORIZON (h=int(signal.construction_window); fwd=forward_return(panel,h)). The hi52 factor's OWN lookback (252d rolling max) lives INSIDE scores() and is independent of this horizon. Pre-registered h=21 (monthly-faithful, matching the ~1-month-holding tests that produced the known verdict): a daily h=1 horizon would ask a DIFFERENT question (1-day continuation) and could give hi52 a horizon-mismatch artifact PASS. Declared HERE so it is not hidden. NW lag=21 (DialConfig) corrects overlapping 21-day forward-return autocorrelation.
coverage_precondition_note: KAPSAM-GUARD (frozen BEFORE the conjugate re-measurement; d213 KAPSAM-GUARD precedent, orthogonal to the verdict). The survivorship-honest full-2019 universe leaves only ~38 liquid+continuous names under the 10M-TL ADV floor -- below the >= 2*50 a default Mod-A arm-pair needs -- so the conjugate machinery degenerates to a breadth-guard FAIL (NOT an IC measurement). To actually exercise conjugate agreement we restrict to eval_window_start=2024-01-02 where the 10M ADV floor (KEPT -- highest, ZERO liquidity relaxation) yields 75 eligible names, and set min_names_per_arm=30 (= the engine's MIN_NAMES_CROSS_SECTION; arms ~37, margin over the per-cross-section floor). Window+arm-floor chosen by a COVERAGE sweep, NOT by the verdict.
underpowered_warning: Small arms (~37) -> noisy per-arm rank-IC. This re-run confirms 'the machine runs + a direction sanity-check', it is NOT a high-confidence conjugate verdict; high-confidence conjugate validation stays in the synthetic fixtures (RR-Y1-005B §7).
